name: implementation-harness
description: Scaffold a Ralph-style single-loop, CI-gated TASKS.json implementation harness into a project's self-contained `.harness/` folder, author its backlog, and operate it — via skills. Worktree or in-place isolation (for projects whose build needs untracked local state), data-driven difficulty auto-tuning that starts every task at the cheapest tier and escalates up a global ladder, a portable zero-dependency backlog dashboard, an ideas-to-tasks pipeline, and operational skills for pre-run vetting, interrupt recovery, and reviewing failed tasks into follow-ups. Distinct from the official ralph-loop plugin.
